title: THE WASH HOUSE - 211info
text: THE WASH HOUSE THE WASH HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides laundry services. Users can drop off their items to be laundered and pick up the same day or the next day. Customers will be given a ticket with their pick up date and time and are allowed to bring one bag per day with a max weight limit of 40 pounds. The Wash House is funded by the City of Portland's Impact Reduction Program (IRP) and staffed by participants of Ground Score Association's GLITTER program. 2609 SE 6th Avenue Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 9am-4pm; except holidays Email 311 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone 311 Alternate (503) 823-4000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near the OMSI/SE Water MAX station Services: Laundry Facilities * Homelessness Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
